work_unit: Deep audit: Rust engine (moni-rs/crates/) — API, trading engine, CogAlpha LLM, core infrastructure (续审 audit-2026-07-06-025)
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete after personal-assistant re-audit. All workspace projects previously audited. moni-master selected for 续审 because audit-2026-07-06-025 only covered local_simulator/api + factors/scripts; Rust crates (API routes, engine, CogAlpha, core) were unexamined.
action: Full deep audit via 4 parallel sub-agents (model=sonnet): (1) moni-api routes.rs/state.rs/lib.rs, (2) moni-engine engine/account/risk/position/fees/rules, (3) moni-cogalpha llm/orchestrator/agents/quality, (4) moni-core paths/config/types. Also verified post-audit-025 commits (478e4fc path traversal, c15bd12 config validation, b877104 Mutex poisoning).
outcome_evidence: Audit report written to .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-07-028.md with 20 findings (2H/10M/5L/3I). audit-cycle-state.json updated: status=fix-in-progress, 12 derived_fixes pending (7 route-fix + 5 direction-shift), 5 structural debts deferred (SD-009..SD-013). No code changes this round (audit-only per protocol).
next_suggestion: Dispatch H-001 COGALPHA-01: add reqwest timeout to DeepSeek client (llm.rs:108) — highest priority route-fix, 1-line change
Dispatch H-002 MONI-API-001: clamp n_sims + spawn_blocking for Monte Carlo (routes.rs:317)
After high-severity fixes: dispatch M-002 stale clone fix in engine.rs:463
Structural debts SD-009..SD-013 need user authorization before dispatch

audit_findings.finding: DeepSeek HTTP client has no timeout → indefinite hang on unresponsive server
audit_findings.remediation: Build client with connect_timeout(10s) + timeout(60s)

audit_findings.finding: POST /wfo/monte-carlo accepts unbounded n_sims, runs CPU-bound work synchronously on async runtime
audit_findings.remediation: Clamp n_sims.min(10000), wrap in spawn_blocking, add DefaultBodyLimit

audit_findings.finding: avg_cost includes buy-side fees → misleading unrealized PnL for display/threshold triggers
audit_findings.remediation: Pass price*qty ex-fees to apply_buy_trade or document fee-inclusive semantics

audit_findings.finding: update_quotes clones orders into stale Vec; same-symbol double-fill against same available_volume
audit_findings.remediation: Re-fetch quote from data_provider inside loop instead of using cloned snapshot

audit_findings.finding: settle_buy_fill drift-clamp silently swallows refund, violates accounting invariant
audit_findings.remediation: Compute shortfall after clamp and deduct from available_cash

audit_findings.finding: 21 concurrent LLM tasks with no semaphore/rate-limiter/token-budget cap
audit_findings.remediation: Add tokio::sync::Semaphore + token counter

audit_findings.finding: Prompt injection via unsanitized context fields in Agent::build_prompt
audit_findings.remediation: Validate/sanitize context; use structured message roles

audit_findings.finding: Silent MockLlmClient fallback when DEEPSEEK_API_KEY missing masks production misconfiguration
audit_findings.remediation: Make fallback configurable; require explicit opt-in env var

audit_findings.finding: Unbounded replay/backtest frames ingestion → memory exhaustion DoS
audit_findings.remediation: Cap frames.len(), add session eviction, spawn_blocking

audit_findings.finding: No auth/authz on any endpoint including state-mutating ones
audit_findings.remediation: If localhost-only: document + bind 127.0.0.1. If exposed: add auth middleware

audit_findings.finding: Symlink TOCTOU on new-file leaf — residual gap in 478e4fc path traversal fix
audit_findings.remediation: Re-canonicalize after create, or use O_NOFOLLOW, or temp+rename

audit_findings.finding: Six env-var path functions return raw PathBuf with no validation — public API surface unguarded
audit_findings.remediation: Deprecate or add base_dir + canonicalize check

audit_findings.finding: Daily loss limit uses <= boundary — blocks at exact threshold
audit_findings.remediation: Confirm intended semantics; change to < if at-limit should allow

audit_findings.finding: release_cash silently caps to frozen_cash, masks double-release bugs
audit_findings.remediation: Log warning on partial release

audit_findings.finding: parse_factor_expressions returns unbounded Vec — hallucinating LLM floods quality eval
audit_findings.remediation: Cap output at 20 expressions per call

audit_findings.finding: Config read TOCTOU between canonicalize and read_to_string
audit_findings.remediation: Read from abs (canonicalized path) when canonicalize succeeds

audit_findings.finding: No upper-bound sanity on fees/ratios — commission_rate=0.99 passes validation
audit_findings.remediation: Add soft warnings for out-of-typical-range values

audit_findings.finding: Fee calculation accepts zero/negative turnover without guard (defense-in-depth)
audit_findings.remediation: Add turnover <= 0 early return

audit_findings.finding: Evolution prompt leaks proprietary factor expressions to external LLM (compliance risk)
audit_findings.remediation: Document data flow; add config flag for local-only mutation

audit_findings.finding: f32→usize silent truncation — NaN/negative saturates to 0 (adjacent crate)
audit_findings.remediation: Validate is_finite && >= 0 before cast
